Name: Example ICP Name
Description: One-to-two-sentence summary of who this ICP is and why they buy. Fold buying triggers and decision context in here — the pre-reorg 'Other' field is gone: e.g. 'Buys when X happens; the decision sits with Y, who evaluates Z.' Account-level pain points now live on the linked Persona records, not here.

Job Titles: Title One; Title Two; Title Three; Title Four
Industries: Industry Tag One; Industry Tag Two; Industry Tag Three
Interests: First buying motivation as a clause; Second motivation; Third motivation; Fourth motivation; Fifth motivation

Name: Example Channel ICP
Description: Channel partners — distributors, dealers, resellers — that move the product to end operators. Different decision-makers and economics from end users; buys/drops a line when margin, support, or lead-time reliability shifts.
Job Titles: VP of Sales; VP of Purchasing; Director of Equipment; Category Manager; Project Sales Manager
Interests: Margin and shelf-velocity per line; Manufacturer support quality; Lead-time reliability; Marketing co-op funds; Spec-side competence
